title: Midday run.mrj bundle header (header.json)
description: Identity/info split (formats/run_mrj.md, D-BUILD-033): `identity` is the deterministic subset and `replay_identity` is hex64(XXH3-64(dump(identity))) over its canonical serialized bytes; `info` is informational only and excluded from every hash and byte-compare. `info.created_at` is the single sanctioned wall-clock slot in a bundle — record content never contains wall-clock time (D-BUILD-013). C++ counterpart: core/journal/bundle.h (change together).

engine_version.description: Engine version that recorded the run; replay refuses on mismatch.

api_compat_hash.description: Registry compat hash (16-digit lowercase hex); a zero slot until m0-api-json wires it.

flight.description: FLIGHT is always on, by construction (Zenith D026).

compression.description: Pinned parameters that make the compressed bytes deterministic (D-BUILD-031).

index_stride_ticks.description: Index granularity: one seek entry (= one zstd frame) per stride of ticks.

created_at.description: Optional wall-clock stamp supplied by the recording verb. Informational only — excluded from all hashes and byte-compares; omitted by default.
